message.content:
Of course! Here's a professional message for you to use:

---

Hi [Coworker's Name],

I hope you're well. I wanted to touch base with you regarding the [project name/short description of the project] that we are working on. I’ve noticed some challenges with [specific issue], and I believe we may need to revisit our approach to stay on track with the project timeline.

Could you schedule a quick meeting to discuss this further? I’d like to explore the best way to address the situation to ensure we can meet the project goals.

Looking forward to your thoughts on this.

Best regards,  
[Your Full Name]  
[Your Job Title]  
[Your Contact Information if necessary]

---

This message keeps the tone professional while allowing for the personal relationship to exist without blurring the lines. Let me know if you need any additional adjustments!
